commentaries.author: Athanasius the Apostolic
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And your life shall hang in doubt before you; and you shall fear day and night, and shall have no assurance of your life: Athanasius the Apostolic Perhaps you have heard of the prophecy of Christ’s death. You ask to learn [from Moses] what is set forth concerning the cross. Not even this is passed over. It is displayed by the holy men with great plainness. For first Moses predicts it, and that even with a loud voice, when he says, “You shall see your Life hanging before your eyes and shall not believe.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And your life shall hang in doubt before you; and you shall fear day and night, and shall have no assurance of your life: Thy life, being in danger from all sides. The Fathers explain this verse of the behaviour of the Jews towards their Messias, who was crucified before their eyes; and still they will not believe in him, though he is their life, (chap. 20,) the way, the truth, and the life, John xiv. Augustine, contra Faustus xvi. 22) (Haydock).
